title: Ars Contexta Vault Note Frontmatter (v2)
description: Canonical frontmatter schema for notes under knowledge/. Upgraded from v1 (2026-04-18) to unlock T3 backlink index, T6 provenance, T11 progressive disclosure, T13 learn-path, and T15 extract-queue priority. Backward-compatible: legacy v1 fields tolerated.

name.description: Descriptive slug matching the filename stem. Readable as a claim when used as a wiki-link.

description.description: Tooltip-grade summary. Powers <VaultHoverCard>. Must pass a cold-read test: a newcomer should understand what the note claims without opening it.

type.description: Determines validator behavior. moc/meta exempt from MOC-membership rule.

topics.description: MOC membership + domain tags. At least one must be an existing MOC slug for non-moc/meta notes.

audience.description: Target audience tiers. Powers T11 progressive disclosure. A note may target multiple tiers.

reviewed.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last human verification. Staleness: verified >365d → info; others >730d → info.

confidence.description: Epistemic weight. 'verified' requires at least one provenance entry.

subject.description: What the claim is about (e.g. 'ESP32 GPIO12').

claims.description: Structured assertions. Enables T3 backlink index to connect claims across notes.

related.description: Note slugs this note cross-references. Mirrors wiki-links in body. Validator confirms each resolves.

supersedes.description: Slugs this note replaces. Validator confirms each exists.

superseded-by.description: Slugs that replace this note. Validator confirms each exists. Consumers SHOULD prefer the replacement.

source.description: Source taxonomy. 'ai-suggested' flags notes awaiting human verification.

page.description: Page number or section identifier within the source.

verified.description: When a human confirmed the citation matches the claim.

verified-by.description: Attribution for the verifier (name, handle, or 'tyler').

provenance.description: Citation trail. Required when confidence == verified.

used-by-surface.description: UI surfaces that consume this note (via <VaultHoverCard> / <VaultExplainer>). Feeds T3 backlink index + T7 health heatmap.

status.description: Lifecycle state. Archived notes hidden from qmd_deep_search by default.

captured_date.description: Legacy v1 field. Kept for extraction-pipeline provenance; not validated beyond format.

extraction_status.description: Legacy v1 field. Used by /extract queue tracking.

triage_status.description: Legacy v1 field. Free-form triage tag (e.g. 'complete_p1_backlog_none', 'gap-stub').

parent_source.description: Legacy v1 field. Filename of the inbox source this note was extracted from.

source_type.description: Legacy v1 field. Kind of source ('e2e-walkthrough', 'vault-gap-seed', etc.).

severity_counts.description: Legacy v1 field on e2e-walkthrough stubs.

e2e_ids.description: Legacy v1 field. E2E finding IDs this note resolves.

unblocks.description: T15: plans this note unblocks on extraction. Priority hint.
